metadata.title: ISTE Standards for Students
metadata.notes: ISTE Standards for Students (2016 revision). K-12 technology competencies.

nodes.title: Empowered Learner
nodes.description: Students leverage technology to take an active role in choosing, achieving, and demonstrating competency in their learning goals

academic_standards.description: Students leverage technology to take an active role in choosing, achieving, and demonstrating competency in their learning goals

nodes.title: Digital Citizen
nodes.description: Students recognize the rights, responsibilities, and opportunities of living, learning, and working in an interconnected digital world

academic_standards.description: Students recognize the rights, responsibilities, and opportunities of living, learning, and working in an interconnected digital world

nodes.title: Knowledge Constructor
nodes.description: Students critically curate a variety of resources using digital tools to construct knowledge and produce creative artifacts

academic_standards.description: Students critically curate a variety of resources using digital tools to construct knowledge and produce creative artifacts

nodes.title: Innovative Designer
nodes.description: Students use a variety of technologies within a design process to identify and solve problems by creating new, useful, or imaginative solutions

academic_standards.description: Students use a variety of technologies within a design process to identify and solve problems by creating new, useful, or imaginative solutions

nodes.title: Computational Thinker
nodes.description: Students develop and employ strategies for understanding and solving problems in ways that leverage the power of technological methods

academic_standards.description: Students develop and employ strategies for understanding and solving problems in ways that leverage the power of technological methods

nodes.title: Creative Communicator
nodes.description: Students communicate clearly and express themselves creatively using platforms, tools, styles, formats, and digital media

academic_standards.description: Students communicate clearly and express themselves creatively using platforms, tools, styles, formats, and digital media

nodes.title: Global Collaborator
nodes.description: Students use digital tools to broaden their perspectives and enrich their learning by collaborating with others locally and globally

academic_standards.description: Students use digital tools to broaden their perspectives and enrich their learning by collaborating with others locally and globally
